knowPrompt.english: Do you know this topic: Introduction?
knowPrompt.hindi: क्या आप यह विषय जानते हैं: परिचय?

explanationParagraphs.english:
**Data** is information collected about something — like scores, attendance, rainfall, etc.

**Graphs** are visual tools that help us display and compare data clearly and quickly. Instead of reading long tables of numbers, a graph lets us see patterns at a glance.

**Why use graphs?**
- To compare different values easily
- To see which is biggest/smallest
- To understand trends (going up or down)

**Two common types in this chapter:**
1. **Pictograph** — uses pictures/symbols to represent data
2. **Bar Graph** — uses bars (rectangles) of different heights to represent data
explanationParagraphs.hindi:
### व्याख्या (हिंदी)

**डेटा (आँकड़े)** किसी विषय के बारे में एकत्रित जानकारी है — जैसे अंक, उपस्थिति, वर्षा आदि।

**आलेख (Graphs)** दृश्य साधन हैं जो हमें डेटा को स्पष्ट और जल्दी से दिखाने और तुलना करने में सहायता करते हैं। लंबी संख्याओं की तालिका पढ़ने के बजाय आलेख से हम एक नज़र में पैटर्न देख सकते हैं।

**आलेखों का उपयोग क्यों?**
- विभिन्न मानों की आसानी से तुलना के लिए
- सबसे बड़ा/सबसे छोटा जानने के लिए
- रुझान (बढ़ना या घटना) समझने के लिए

**इस अध्याय में दो सामान्य प्रकार:**
1. **चित्रालेख** — डेटा दर्शाने के लिए चित्रों/चिह्नों का उपयोग
2. **दंड आलेख** — डेटा दर्शाने के लिए अलग-अलग ऊँचाई के दंड (आयत) का उपयोग

prompt.english: Why do we use graphs?
prompt.hindi: हम आलेखों का उपयोग क्यों करते हैं?

options.english: To show and compare data clearly
options.hindi: आँकड़ों को साफ़ दिखाने और तुलना करने के लिए
भिन्नों का भाग करने के लिए

wrongReason.english: We use graphs **to show and compare data clearly**. Graphs make it easy to understand information at a glance without reading complex tables of numbers.
wrongReason.hindi: We use graphs **to show and compare data clearly**. Graphs make it easy to understand information at a glance without reading complex tables of numbers.

supportExample.english: We use graphs **to show and compare data clearly**. Graphs make it easy to understand information at a glance without reading complex tables of numbers.
supportExample.hindi: We use graphs **to show and compare data clearly**. Graphs make it easy to understand information at a glance without reading complex tables of numbers.

reteachParagraphs.english: We use graphs **to show and compare data clearly**. Graphs make it easy to understand information at a glance without reading complex tables of numbers.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: We use graphs **to show and compare data clearly**. Graphs make it easy to understand information at a glance without reading complex tables of numbers.

knowPrompt.english: Do you know this topic: Pictograph?
knowPrompt.hindi: क्या आप यह विषय जानते हैं: चित्रालेख?

explanationParagraphs.english:
A **pictograph** (also called pictogram) uses pictures or symbols to represent data. Each picture stands for a fixed number.

**Key features:**
- A **key** (scale) tells you how many units one symbol represents
- If 1 symbol = 5 apples, then 4 symbols = 4 × 5 = 20 apples
- You can use half a symbol to show half the value

**How to read a pictograph:**
1. Read the key first (what does 1 symbol = ?)
2. Count the symbols for each category
3. Multiply: number of symbols × value of each symbol

**Example:** If 1 star = 10 books, and a shelf has 3 stars, it means 3 × 10 = 30 books.
explanationParagraphs.hindi:
### व्याख्या (हिंदी)

**चित्रालेख** (Pictograph) डेटा दर्शाने के लिए चित्रों या चिह्नों का उपयोग करता है। प्रत्येक चित्र एक निश्चित संख्या का प्रतिनिधित्व करता है।

**मुख्य विशेषताएँ:**
- एक **कुंजी (पैमाना)** बताती है कि एक चिह्न कितनी इकाइयों को दर्शाता है
- यदि 1 चिह्न = 5 सेब, तो 4 चिह्न = 4 × 5 = 20 सेब
- आधे मान के लिए आधा चिह्न उपयोग किया जा सकता है

**चित्रालेख पढ़ने का तरीका:**
1. पहले कुंजी पढ़ें (1 चिह्न = कितना?)
2. प्रत्येक श्रेणी के लिए चिह्न गिनें
3. गुणा करें: चिह्नों की संख्या × प्रत्येक चिह्न का मान

**उदाहरण:** यदि 1 तारा = 10 किताबें, और एक शेल्फ पर 3 तारे हैं, तो वहाँ 3 × 10 = 30 किताबें हैं।

examples.english: **Example:** If 1 star = 10 books, and a shelf has 3 stars, it means 3 × 10 = 30 books.
examples.hindi: **उदाहरण:** यदि 1 तारा = 10 किताबें, और एक शेल्फ पर 3 तारे हैं, तो वहाँ 3 × 10 = 30 किताबें हैं।

prompt.english: In a pictograph, 1 symbol = 5 apples. How many apples do 4 symbols show?
prompt.hindi: एक चित्रालेख में 1 चिह्न = 5 सेब है। 4 चिह्न कितने सेब दिखाएँगे?

reteachParagraphs.english: Number of apples = 4 × 5 = **20 apples**
reteachParagraphs.hindi: Number of apples = 4 × 5 = **20 apples**

knowPrompt.english: Do you know this topic: Bar Graph?
knowPrompt.hindi: क्या आप यह विषय जानते हैं: दंड आलेख?

explanationParagraphs.english:
A **bar graph** uses rectangular bars to represent data. The height (or length) of each bar shows the value for that category.

**Key features:**
- The horizontal axis (x-axis) shows categories (days, months, items, etc.)
- The vertical axis (y-axis) shows numbers (scale)
- The scale tells you: 1 unit on the y-axis = how many real units

**How to read a bar graph:**
1. Look at the scale on the y-axis
2. Find the height of the bar for each category
3. Multiply height × scale value to get the actual number

**Example:** If 1 unit = 10 students, and a bar has height 6, then: 6 × 10 = **60 students**
explanationParagraphs.hindi:
### व्याख्या (हिंदी)

**दंड आलेख** डेटा दर्शाने के लिए आयताकार दंडों (bars) का उपयोग करता है। प्रत्येक दंड की ऊँचाई (या लंबाई) उस श्रेणी के मान को दर्शाती है।

**मुख्य विशेषताएँ:**
- क्षैतिज अक्ष (x-axis) श्रेणियाँ दिखाता है (दिन, महीने, वस्तुएँ आदि)
- ऊर्ध्वाधर अक्ष (y-axis) संख्याएँ दिखाता है (पैमाना)
- पैमाना बताता है: y-axis की 1 इकाई = कितनी वास्तविक इकाइयाँ

**दंड आलेख पढ़ने का तरीका:**
1. y-axis पर पैमाना देखें
2. प्रत्येक श्रेणी के लिए दंड की ऊँचाई देखें
3. ऊँचाई × पैमाना मान = वास्तविक संख्या

**उदाहरण:** यदि 1 इकाई = 10 विद्यार्थी, और एक दंड की ऊँचाई 6 है, तो: 6 × 10 = **60 विद्यार्थी**

examples.english: **Example:** If 1 unit = 10 students, and a bar has height 6, then: 6 × 10 = **60 students**
examples.hindi: **उदाहरण:** यदि 1 इकाई = 10 विद्यार्थी, और एक दंड की ऊँचाई 6 है, तो: 6 × 10 = **60 विद्यार्थी**

prompt.english: In a bar graph, 1 unit = 10 students. What does a bar of height 6 show?
prompt.hindi: एक दंड आलेख में 1 इकाई = 10 विद्यार्थी है। ऊँचाई 6 वाला दंड क्या दिखाता है?

reteachParagraphs.english: Number of students = 6 × 10 = **60 students**
reteachParagraphs.hindi: Number of students = 6 × 10 = **60 students**

prompt.english: Students present during the week are Monday 36, Tuesday 30, Wednesday 33, Thursday 39, Friday 30 and Saturday 27. Take one symbol to represent 3 students and draw a pictograph. Then type done
prompt.hindi: Students present during the week are Monday 36, Tuesday 30, Wednesday 33, Thursday 39, Friday 30 and Saturday 27. Take one symbol to represent 3 students and draw a pictograph. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english: Take 1 symbol = 3 students.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: 1 प्रतीक = 3 छात्र मानिए।

reteachParagraphs.english:
Now divide each number by 3 to find how many symbols we need:
- Monday: 36 ÷ 3 = 12 symbols
- Tuesday: 30 ÷ 3 = 10 symbols
- Wednesday: 33 ÷ 3 = 11 symbols
- Thursday: 39 ÷ 3 = 13 symbols
- Friday: 30 ÷ 3 = 10 symbols
- Saturday: 27 ÷ 3 = 9 symbols
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
अब हर दिन के छात्रों की संख्या को 3 से भाग दें:
- Monday: 36 ÷ 3 = 12 प्रतीक
- Tuesday: 30 ÷ 3 = 10 प्रतीक
- Wednesday: 33 ÷ 3 = 11 प्रतीक
- Thursday: 39 ÷ 3 = 13 प्रतीक
- Friday: 30 ÷ 3 = 10 प्रतीक
- Saturday: 27 ÷ 3 = 9 प्रतीक

reteachParagraphs.english:
Pictograph:
- Monday: ●●●●●●●●●●●●
- Tuesday: ●●●●●●●●●●
- Wednesday: ●●●●●●●●●●●
- Thursday: ●●●●●●●●●●●●●
- Friday: ●●●●●●●●●●
- Saturday: ●●●●●●●●●

This is the pictograph of students present during the week.
done
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
यह सप्ताह के छात्रों की उपस्थिति का पिक्टोग्राफ है।
done

prompt.english: A village has 6500 men, 4500 women and 1500 children. Take one men symbol = 500 men, one women symbol = 500 women and one children symbol = 500 children, and draw a pictograph to show the population. Then type done
prompt.hindi: A village has 6500 men, 4500 women and 1500 children. Take one men symbol = 500 men, one women symbol = 500 women and one children symbol = 500 children, and draw a pictograph to show the population. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 1: Find the symbols.
6500 men ÷ 500 = 13 symbols
4500 women ÷ 500 = 9 symbols
1500 children ÷ 500 = 3 symbols
Step 2: Draw the pictograph.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: चरण 2: चित्रलेख बनाओ।

reteachParagraphs.english:
Key:
1 ● = 500 men
1 ■ = 500 women
1 ▲ = 500 children

Pictograph:
Men:      ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ●
Women:    ■ ■ ■ ■ ■ ■ ■ ■ ■
Children: ▲ ▲ ▲

Step 3: Check.
Men: 13 × 500 = 6500
Women: 9 × 500 = 4500
Children: 3 × 500 = 1500

Final answer: The pictograph shows the population correctly.
done
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
अंतिम उत्तर: यह चित्रलेख जनसंख्या को सही दिखाता है।
done

prompt.english: Vehicles running in a day on the roads of Meerut city are: cycles 800, scooters 500, cars 300 and buses 200. Convey the information through a pictograph. Then type done
prompt.hindi: Vehicles running in a day on the roads of Meerut city are: cycles 800, scooters 500, cars 300 and buses 200. Convey the information through a pictograph. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 1: Choose a key for the pictograph.
Let 1 symbol = 100 vehicles.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 1: पिक्टोग्राफ के लिए एक key चुनिए।
मान लीजिए 1 चिन्ह = 100 वाहन।

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 2: Write each number using the key.
- Cycles = 800 = 8 symbols
- Scooters = 500 = 5 symbols
- Cars = 300 = 3 symbols
- Buses = 200 = 2 symbols
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 2: हर संख्या को key के अनुसार लिखिए।
- साइकिल = 800 = 8 चिन्ह
- स्कूटर = 500 = 5 चिन्ह
- कार = 300 = 3 चिन्ह
- बस = 200 = 2 चिन्ह

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 3: Draw the pictograph.
Key: ● = 100 vehicles
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 3: पिक्टोग्राफ बनाइए।
Key: ● = 100 वाहन

reteachParagraphs.english:
Cycles:    ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ●
Scooters:  ● ● ● ● ●
Cars:      ● ● ●
Buses:     ● ●
This pictograph shows the number of vehicles running in a day in Meerut city.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: यह पिक्टोग्राफ मेरठ शहर में एक दिन में चलने वाले वाहनों की संख्या दिखाता है।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: done
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: done

prompt.english: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (a): How many students go to school on foot?
prompt.hindi: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (a): How many students go to school on foot?

reteachParagraphs.english: Part (a): How many students go to school on foot?
reteachParagraphs.hindi: भाग (a): कितने छात्र पैदल स्कूल जाते हैं?

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 1: Count the pictures for students who go on foot.
There are 4 pictures.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 1: पैदल जाने वाले छात्रों के चित्र गिनिए।
यहाँ 4 चित्र हैं।

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 2: Find the value of one picture.
Each picture represents 100 students.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 2: एक चित्र का मान निकालिए।
हर चित्र 100 छात्रों को दिखाता है।

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 3: Multiply.
4 × 100 = 400
So, 400 students go to school on foot.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: इसलिए, 400 छात्र पैदल स्कूल जाते हैं।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: 400 students.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: 400 छात्र।

prompt.english: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (b): How many students use school bus?
prompt.hindi: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (b): How many students use school bus?

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 1: In the pictograph, the bus has 1 picture.
Step 2: Each picture represents 100 students.
Step 3: So, 1 picture = 100 students.
Therefore, the number of students who use the school bus is 100 students.
Final Answer: 100 students.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 1: पिक्टोग्राफ में बस के लिए 1 चित्र दिया है।
चरण 2: हर 1 चित्र 100 छात्रों को दिखाता है।
चरण 3: इसलिए 1 चित्र = 100 छात्र।
इसलिए, स्कूल बस से जाने वाले छात्रों की संख्या 100 है।
अंतिम उत्तर: 100 छात्र।

prompt.english: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (c): How many students use bicycle to go to their school?
prompt.hindi: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (c): How many students use bicycle to go to their school?

reteachParagraphs.english: To find how many students use a bicycle, look at the pictograph.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: साइकिल से जाने वाले छात्रों की संख्या निकालने के लिए पिक्टोग्राफ को देखें।

reteachParagraphs.english:
- Bicycle has 5 pictures.
- Each picture represents 100 students.
- So, multiply 5 × 100.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
- साइकिल के लिए 5 चित्र हैं।
- हर एक चित्र 100 छात्रों को दिखाता है।
- इसलिए 5 × 100 करते हैं।

reteachParagraphs.english: So, 500 students use a bicycle to go to their school.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: इसलिए, अपने स्कूल जाने के लिए साइकिल का उपयोग करने वाले छात्रों की संख्या 500 है।

prompt.english: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (d): How many students in all are there in the school?
prompt.hindi: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (d): How many students in all are there in the school?

reteachParagraphs.english: We count all the pictures in the pictograph.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: हम चित्रलेख में सभी चित्रों को गिनते हैं।

reteachParagraphs.english:
On foot = 4 pictures
By bicycle = 5 pictures
By car = 1 picture
By bus = 1 picture
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
पैदल = 4 चित्र
साइकिल से = 5 चित्र
कार से = 1 चित्र
बस से = 1 चित्र

reteachParagraphs.english: Total pictures = 4 + 5 + 1 + 1 = 11

Each picture represents 100 students.
So, total students = 11 × 100 = 1100
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
हर चित्र 100 विद्यार्थियों को दिखाता है।
इसलिए, कुल विद्यार्थी = 11 × 100 = 1100

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: 1100 students.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: 1100 विद्यार्थी।

prompt.english: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (e): What mode is adopted by maximum number of students?
prompt.hindi: A pictograph shows students travelling to school: on foot = 4 pictures, on bicycle = 5 pictures, by car = 1 picture and by bus = 1 picture. Each picture represents 100 students. Answer the following questions Part (e): What mode is adopted by maximum number of students?

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 1: Read the pictograph values.
- On foot = 4 pictures
- On bicycle = 5 pictures
- By car = 1 picture
- By bus = 1 picture
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 1: पिक्टोग्राफ में दिए गए चित्रों को पढ़िए।
- पैदल = 4 चित्र
- साइकिल से = 5 चित्र
- कार से = 1 चित्र
- बस से = 1 चित्र

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 2: Each picture represents 100 students.
- On foot = 4 × 100 = 400 students
- On bicycle = 5 × 100 = 500 students
- By car = 1 × 100 = 100 students
- By bus = 1 × 100 = 100 students

Step 3: Compare the numbers.
- 400, 500, 100, 100

The greatest number is 500.
So, the mode used by the maximum number of students is on bicycle.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
सबसे बड़ी संख्या 500 है।
इसलिए, सबसे अधिक छात्र साइकिल से स्कूल जाते हैं।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: on bicycle
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: साइकिल से

prompt.english: In a colony of Delhi, persons knowing different languages are Hindi 500, Tamil 450, Bengali 250 and Malayalam 150. Draw a pictograph which conveys the information. Then type done
prompt.hindi: In a colony of Delhi, persons knowing different languages are Hindi 500, Tamil 450, Bengali 250 and Malayalam 150. Draw a pictograph which conveys the information. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english: To draw a pictograph, we first choose a scale.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: पिक्टोग्राफ बनाने के लिए हम पहले एक scale चुनते हैं।

reteachParagraphs.english: Scale: 1 symbol = 50 persons
reteachParagraphs.hindi: Scale: 1 चिन्ह = 50 व्यक्ति

reteachParagraphs.english:
Now divide each number by 50:
- Hindi: 500 ÷ 50 = 10 symbols
- Tamil: 450 ÷ 50 = 9 symbols
- Bengali: 250 ÷ 50 = 5 symbols
- Malayalam: 150 ÷ 50 = 3 symbols
Pictograph:
reteachParagraphs.hindi: पिक्टोग्राफ:

reteachParagraphs.english: Key: 👤 = 50 persons
reteachParagraphs.hindi: Key: 👤 = 50 व्यक्ति

reteachParagraphs.english:
Hindi      👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤
Tamil      👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤 👤
Bengali    👤 👤 👤 👤 👤
Malayalam  👤 👤 👤
So, the pictograph shows the number of people speaking each language in the colony.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: इस तरह पिक्टोग्राफ कॉलोनी में अलग-अलग भाषाएँ जानने वाले लोगों की संख्या दिखाता है।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: done.

prompt.english: The number of absentees during the first five days of a week is: day I = 30, day II = 45, day III = 20, day IV = 50 and day V = 15. Draw a bar graph to convey the information. Then type done
prompt.hindi: The number of absentees during the first five days of a week is: day I = 30, day II = 45, day III = 20, day IV = 50 and day V = 15. Draw a bar graph to convey the information. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english: To draw the bar graph, follow these steps:
reteachParagraphs.hindi: बार ग्राफ बनाने के लिए ये कदम अपनाइए:

reteachParagraphs.english:
1. Draw two lines, called axes.
2. Write the days on the horizontal axis:
   Day I, Day II, Day III, Day IV, Day V.
3. Write the number of absentees on the vertical axis.
4. Choose a scale. For example, 1 unit = 5 absentees.
5. Draw one bar for each day with the correct height:
   - Day I = 30
   - Day II = 45
   - Day III = 20
   - Day IV = 50
   - Day V = 15
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
1. पहले दो रेखाएं बनाइए, जिन्हें अक्ष कहते हैं।
2. नीचे वाली रेखा पर दिन लिखिए:
   Day I, Day II, Day III, Day IV, Day V.
3. खड़ी रेखा पर absentees की संख्या लिखिए।
4. एक scale चुनिए। उदाहरण: 1 unit = 5 absentees.
5. हर दिन के लिए सही ऊंचाई का एक-एक bar बनाइए:
   - Day I = 30
   - Day II = 45
   - Day III = 20
   - Day IV = 50
   - Day V = 15

reteachParagraphs.english: A simple text version of the bar graph is:
reteachParagraphs.hindi: बार ग्राफ का एक simple text version:

reteachParagraphs.english: So, the tallest bar is for Day IV and the shortest bar is for Day V.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: इसमें Day IV का bar सबसे ऊंचा है और Day V का bar सबसे छोटा है।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: done
reteachParagraphs.hindi: Final answer: done

prompt.english: Amit's marks in five consecutive tests are: I = 60, II = 80, III = 40, IV = 70, V = 90. Draw a bar graph showing the marks obtained by Amit in these tests. Then type done
prompt.hindi: Amit's marks in five consecutive tests are: I = 60, II = 80, III = 40, IV = 70, V = 90. Draw a bar graph showing the marks obtained by Amit in these tests. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english:
To draw the bar graph for Amit’s marks, follow these steps:
1. Draw two lines at right angles.
2. On the horizontal axis, write the test numbers: I, II, III, IV, V.
3. On the vertical axis, write the marks scale from 0 to 90.
4. Choose a simple scale, such as 10 marks = 1 unit.
5. Draw one bar for each test with these heights:
   - Test I = 60
   - Test II = 80
   - Test III = 40
   - Test IV = 70
   - Test V = 90
6. Keep all bars the same width and leave equal gaps between them.
7. Give the graph a title: “Amit’s Marks in Five Tests.”
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
अमित के अंकों का बार ग्राफ बनाने के लिए ये कदम अपनाइए:
1. सबसे पहले दो सीधी रेखाएँ एक-दूसरे के लंबवत खींचिए।
2. क्षैतिज अक्ष (Horizontal axis) पर टेस्ट के नाम लिखिए: I, II, III, IV, V.
3. ऊर्ध्वाधर अक्ष (Vertical axis) पर अंकों का पैमाना 0 से 90 तक लिखिए।
4. एक सरल स्केल चुनिए, जैसे 10 अंक = 1 इकाई।
5. हर टेस्ट के लिए एक-एक बार बनाइए, जिनकी ऊँचाइयाँ ये हों:
   - टेस्ट I = 60
   - टेस्ट II = 80
   - टेस्ट III = 40
   - टेस्ट IV = 70
   - टेस्ट V = 90
6. सभी बार की चौड़ाई समान रखिए और उनके बीच बराबर दूरी रखिए।
7. ग्राफ का शीर्षक लिखिए: “अमित के पाँच टेस्टों के अंक।”

reteachParagraphs.english: So the bar graph should show the marks 60, 80, 40, 70, and 90 for Tests I to V.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: इस तरह बार ग्राफ में टेस्ट I, II, III, IV, V के लिए क्रमशः 60, 80, 40, 70, और 90 अंक दिखेंगे।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: done.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: done.

prompt.english: There are 300 students in a school. Tamil = 125, Telugu = 75, Malayalam = 50, Hindi = 25 and Bengali = 25. Draw a bar graph to represent the data. Then type done
prompt.hindi: There are 300 students in a school. Tamil = 125, Telugu = 75, Malayalam = 50, Hindi = 25 and Bengali = 25. Draw a bar graph to represent the data. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english: To draw the bar graph, follow these steps:
reteachParagraphs.hindi: बार ग्राफ बनाने के लिए ये कदम अपनाइए:

reteachParagraphs.english:
1. Draw two lines, one horizontal and one vertical.
2. Write the language names on the horizontal line (x-axis): Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam, Hindi, Bengali.
3. Write the number of students on the vertical line (y-axis).
4. Choose a scale, for example:
   - 1 unit = 25 students
5. Now draw bars with these heights:
   - Tamil = 125 students = 5 units
   - Telugu = 75 students = 3 units
   - Malayalam = 50 students = 2 units
   - Hindi = 25 students = 1 unit
   - Bengali = 25 students = 1 unit
6. Give the graph a title, such as "Students by Language".
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
1. एक क्षैतिज रेखा और एक ऊर्ध्वाधर रेखा बनाइए।
2. क्षैतिज रेखा (x-axis) पर भाषाओं के नाम लिखिए: तमिल, तेलुगु, मलयालम, हिंदी, बंगाली।
3. ऊर्ध्वाधर रेखा (y-axis) पर विद्यार्थियों की संख्या लिखिए।
4. एक scale चुनिए, जैसे:
   - 1 इकाई = 25 विद्यार्थी
5. अब इन ऊँचाइयों की पट्टियाँ बनाइए:
   - तमिल = 125 विद्यार्थी = 5 इकाई
   - तेलुगु = 75 विद्यार्थी = 3 इकाई
   - मलयालम = 50 विद्यार्थी = 2 इकाई
   - हिंदी = 25 विद्यार्थी = 1 इकाई
   - बंगाली = 25 विद्यार्थी = 1 इकाई
6. ग्राफ का शीर्षक लिखिए, जैसे "भाषा के अनुसार विद्यार्थी"।

reteachParagraphs.english: The bar for Tamil should be the tallest, and the bars for Hindi and Bengali should be the shortest and equal in height.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: तमिल की पट्टी सबसे ऊँची होगी, और हिंदी तथा बंगाली की पट्टियाँ सबसे छोटी और बराबर होंगी।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: done
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: done

prompt.english: The number of different books in a library is: English 450, Mathematics 600, General Knowledge 150, Science 250 and Tamil 200. Draw a bar graph to represent the data. Then type done
prompt.hindi: The number of different books in a library is: English 450, Mathematics 600, General Knowledge 150, Science 250 and Tamil 200. Draw a bar graph to represent the data. Then type done

reteachParagraphs.english: To draw the bar graph, follow these steps:
reteachParagraphs.hindi: बार ग्राफ बनाने के लिए ये कदम अपनाइए:

reteachParagraphs.english:
1. Draw two lines: a horizontal axis and a vertical axis.
2. Write the book types on the horizontal axis:
   English, Mathematics, General Knowledge, Science, Tamil.
3. Choose a suitable scale on the vertical axis. A good scale is:
   1 unit = 50 books.
4. Find the height of each bar:
   - English = 450 books = 9 units
   - Mathematics = 600 books = 12 units
   - General Knowledge = 150 books = 3 units
   - Science = 250 books = 5 units
   - Tamil = 200 books = 4 units
5. Draw one bar for each subject with the correct height.
6. Give the graph a title like “Different Books in a Library”.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
1. दो रेखाएँ खींचिए: एक क्षैतिज रेखा और एक ऊर्ध्वाधर रेखा।
2. क्षैतिज अक्ष पर पुस्तक के प्रकार लिखिए:
   English, Mathematics, General Knowledge, Science, Tamil.
3. ऊर्ध्वाधर अक्ष पर किताबों की संख्या लिखिए। एक अच्छा पैमाना यह हो सकता है:
   1 इकाई = 50 किताबें।
4. हर बार की ऊँचाई निकालिए:
   - English = 450 किताबें = 9 इकाई
   - Mathematics = 600 किताबें = 12 इकाई
   - General Knowledge = 150 किताबें = 3 इकाई
   - Science = 250 किताबें = 5 इकाई
   - Tamil = 200 किताबें = 4 इकाई
5. हर विषय के लिए सही ऊँचाई का एक-एक बार बनाइए।
6. ग्राफ का शीर्षक लिखिए: “पुस्तकालय में विभिन्न पुस्तकों की संख्या”。

reteachParagraphs.english: So the bar graph should have bars of heights 9, 12, 3, 5, and 4 units.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: इसलिए बार ग्राफ में 9, 12, 3, 5, और 4 इकाई ऊँचाई के बार होंगे।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: done
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: done

prompt.english: Rainfall in cm for six months is: June 5, July 12, August 6, September 3, October 2 and November 4. Answer the following questions Part (a): In which month was the rainfall maximum?
prompt.hindi: Rainfall in cm for six months is: June 5, July 12, August 6, September 3, October 2 and November 4. Answer the following questions Part (a): In which month was the rainfall maximum?

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 1: Write the rainfall for each month.
June = 5 cm, July = 12 cm, August = 6 cm, September = 3 cm, October = 2 cm, November = 4 cm.
Step 2: Compare the numbers.
12 cm is the greatest rainfall.
Step 3: Find the month with 12 cm.
July has 12 cm rainfall.
Final Answer: July
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 1: हर महीने की वर्षा लिखिए।
जून = 5 सेमी, जुलाई = 12 सेमी, अगस्त = 6 सेमी, सितंबर = 3 सेमी, अक्टूबर = 2 सेमी, नवंबर = 4 सेमी।
चरण 2: सभी संख्याओं की तुलना कीजिए।
12 सेमी सबसे अधिक वर्षा है।
चरण 3: देखें कि 12 सेमी किस महीने में है।
12 सेमी जुलाई में है।
अंतिम उत्तर: जुलाई।

prompt.english: Rainfall in cm for six months is: June 5, July 12, August 6, September 3, October 2 and November 4. Answer the following questions Part (b): How much was the rainfall in September?
prompt.hindi: Rainfall in cm for six months is: June 5, July 12, August 6, September 3, October 2 and November 4. Answer the following questions Part (b): How much was the rainfall in September?

reteachParagraphs.english: We are given the rainfall for each month.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: हमें हर महीने की वर्षा दी गई है।

reteachParagraphs.english:
June = 5 cm
July = 12 cm
August = 6 cm
September = 3 cm
October = 2 cm
November = 4 cm
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
जून = 5 सेमी
जुलाई = 12 सेमी
अगस्त = 6 सेमी
सितंबर = 3 सेमी
अक्टूबर = 2 सेमी
नवंबर = 4 सेमी

reteachParagraphs.english:
The question asks for the rainfall in September.
From the list, September rainfall is 3 cm.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
प्रश्न सितंबर महीने की वर्षा पूछ रहा है।
सूची में सितंबर की वर्षा 3 सेमी है।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: 3 cm
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: 3 सेमी

prompt.english: Rainfall in cm for six months is: June 5, July 12, August 6, September 3, October 2 and November 4. Answer the following questions Part (c): Which month was the driest?
prompt.hindi: Rainfall in cm for six months is: June 5, July 12, August 6, September 3, October 2 and November 4. Answer the following questions Part (c): Which month was the driest?

reteachParagraphs.english: The driest month is the month with the least rainfall.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: सबसे शुष्क महीना वह होता है जिसमें सबसे कम वर्षा होती है।

reteachParagraphs.english:
Rainfall given:
- June: 5 cm
- July: 12 cm
- August: 6 cm
- September: 3 cm
- October: 2 cm
- November: 4 cm
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
दी गई वर्षा:
- जून: 5 सेमी
- जुलाई: 12 सेमी
- अगस्त: 6 सेमी
- सितंबर: 3 सेमी
- अक्टूबर: 2 सेमी
- नवंबर: 4 सेमी

reteachParagraphs.english:
Now compare the rainfall values. The smallest amount is 2 cm.
That 2 cm rainfall was in October.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
अब सभी महीनों की वर्षा की तुलना करें। सबसे कम वर्षा 2 सेमी है।
यह 2 सेमी वर्षा अक्टूबर में हुई थी।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: October.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: अक्टूबर।

prompt.english: A bar graph gives the number of families by number of members: 1 member = 5 families, 2 members = 10 families, 3 members = 40 families, 4 members = 45 families, 5 members = 30 families and 6 members = 20 families. Answer the following questions Part (a): What information does the bar graph give?
prompt.hindi: A bar graph gives the number of families by number of members: 1 member = 5 families, 2 members = 10 families, 3 members = 40 families, 4 members = 45 families, 5 members = 30 families and 6 members = 20 families. Answer the following questions Part (a): What information does the bar graph give?

acceptedAnswers: Number of families having a particular number of members

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 1: Read what the bar graph shows.
It shows the number of families for each number of members.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 1: बार ग्राफ क्या दिखाता है, यह पढ़िए।
यह हर परिवार में सदस्यों की संख्या के अनुसार परिवारों की संख्या दिखाता है।

reteachParagraphs.english:
Step 2: Look at the bars.
Each bar tells how many families have 1 member, 2 members, 3 members, 4 members, 5 members, or 6 members.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
चरण 2: बारों को देखिए।
हर बार यह बताती है कि 1 सदस्य, 2 सदस्य, 3 सदस्य, 4 सदस्य, 5 सदस्य या 6 सदस्य वाले कितने परिवार हैं।

reteachParagraphs.english: So, the bar graph gives the number of families having a particular number of members.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: इसलिए, यह बार ग्राफ किसी विशेष सदस्य संख्या वाले परिवारों की संख्या बताता है।

reteachParagraphs.english: Final answer: Number of families having a particular number of members.
reteachParagraphs.hindi: अंतिम उत्तर: किसी विशेष सदस्य संख्या वाले परिवारों की संख्या।

prompt.english: A bar graph gives the number of families by number of members: 1 member = 5 families, 2 members = 10 families, 3 members = 40 families, 4 members = 45 families, 5 members = 30 families and 6 members = 20 families. Answer the following questions Part (b): How many families have 3 members?
prompt.hindi: A bar graph gives the number of families by number of members: 1 member = 5 families, 2 members = 10 families, 3 members = 40 families, 4 members = 45 families, 5 members = 30 families and 6 members = 20 families. Answer the following questions Part (b): How many families have 3 members?

reteachParagraphs.english:
We look at the bar graph for the families with 3 members.
The graph shows that 3 members = 40 families.
So, the number of families having 3 members is 40.
Final answer: 40
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
हम 3 सदस्यों वाले परिवारों के लिए बार ग्राफ देखते हैं।
ग्राफ में 3 सदस्यों के लिए 40 परिवार दिखाए गए हैं।
इसलिए, 3 सदस्यों वाले परिवारों की संख्या 40 है।
अंतिम उत्तर: 40

prompt.english: A bar graph gives the number of families by number of members: 1 member = 5 families, 2 members = 10 families, 3 members = 40 families, 4 members = 45 families, 5 members = 30 families and 6 members = 20 families. Answer the following questions Part (c): How many families have 6 members?
prompt.hindi: A bar graph gives the number of families by number of members: 1 member = 5 families, 2 members = 10 families, 3 members = 40 families, 4 members = 45 families, 5 members = 30 families and 6 members = 20 families. Answer the following questions Part (c): How many families have 6 members?

reteachParagraphs.english:
From the bar graph, look at the group for 6 members.
It shows 20 families.
So, the number of families that have 6 members is 20.
Final answer: 20 families.
reteachParagraphs.hindi:
बार ग्राफ में 6 सदस्यों वाले समूह को देखें।
यह 20 परिवार दिखाता है।
इसलिए, 6 सदस्य वाले परिवारों की संख्या 20 है।
अंतिम उत्तर: 20 परिवार।
